stemHtml: Which of the following sequences of speed for a jet aeroplane is correct? (from low to high speeds)

options.a: V<sub>S</sub>, maximum angle climb speed, maximum range speed.
options.b: Maximum endurance speed, long range speed, maximum range speed.
options.c: Maximum endurance speed, maximum range speed, maximum angle of climb speed.
options.d: V<sub>S</sub>, maximum range speed, maximum angle climb speed.
